description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Cross-Platform CI that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to the master branch. Use a matrix strategy to build on macos-latest, windows-latest, and ubuntu-latest. For each OS, check out the repository, prepare the environment (installing OpenSSL on Windows, fixing pkgconfig on macOS), create a build directory, configure with CMake, build, and then run tests with different commands based on the OS. Additionally, on push events, generate a badge for each OS.
